{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/95986478?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SnailSploit/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SnailSploit/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SnailSploit/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SnailSploit/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/SnailSploit", "id": 95986478, "login": "SnailSploit", "node_id": "U_kgDOBbijLg", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SnailSploit/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SnailSploit/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SnailSploit/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SnailSploit/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SnailSploit/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/SnailSploit", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-44217", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:H/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N/E:U"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-93", "name": "Improper Neutralization of CRLF Sequences ('CRLF Injection')"}], "description": "### Impact

Implementations that allows user-provided values to be passed to `event`, `retry` or `id` fields would be susceptible to event spoofing, where an attacker could inject arbitrary messages into the stream.

- **Event Spoofing:** Attacker can inject arbitrary SSE events into the stream
- **Client-side Manipulation:** Injected events can trigger unintended behavior in frontend JavaScript EventSource listeners
- **Data Integrity:** Consumers of the SSE stream cannot distinguish injected events from legitimate ones

### Patches
Patch available in v4.0.1.

### Workarounds
Do not allow user data to control `event`, `retry` or `id` fields, and if you must - sanitize the input before passing it to `sse-channel`, stripping any newlines. 

### Resources

title: sse-channel: SSE Injection via unsanitized event fields
